2_primaryJTBD.decision: How do I set up my annual training plan to reach my golf goals?

primaryCTA.label: Proceed to next step / Generate annual plan

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: EXCELLENT - Strong decision focus for wizard flow
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Next/Generate Plan is clear primary action

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Clear wizard pattern with step-by-step progression

kpis.note: Shows user where they are in the process

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Linear wizard flow with minimal friction

8_stateCoverage.assessment: EXCELLENT - Comprehensive state handling including plan generation loading/success/error

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all skill levels - progressive disclosure through wizard

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Professional multi-step onboarding wizard with comprehensive plan generation
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: 7-step wizard that generates annual training plan
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: 7-step wizard that generates annual training plan

topIssues.issue: No ability to save partial progress and return later
topIssues.impact: Users may lose selections if they exit before completing

topIssues.issue: No preview of generated plan before final commit
topIssues.impact: Users cannot verify plan before accepting

topIssues.issue: Navigation between steps requires linear progression
topIssues.impact: Cannot easily jump to edit previous step

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add draft saving + plan preview step before final generation + allow non-linear navigation

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses full-screen wizard pattern (breaks from standard PageHeader). Integrates with annual plan generation via planGenerationAPI. Unique one-time setup flow.

stateHandling.loading: isGenerating state with loading spinner during plan generation
stateHandling.error: showError state with error messages and retry option

dataSource.note: Calls planGenerationAPI.generateAnnualPlan with real backend integration

accessibility.keyboardNav: Good - wizard supports keyboard navigation with tab/enter

wizardSteps.title: Choose Categories
wizardSteps.description: Select which golf categories you want to focus on
wizardSteps.inputs: Category checkboxes (Teknikk, Putting, Short Game, Long Game, Mental)

wizardSteps.title: Training Volume
wizardSteps.description: How much time can you dedicate to training?

overallAssessment: EXCELLENT - Professional wizard with comprehensive plan generation, needs minor improvements for UX flexibility
